title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. urbicoides
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. urbicoides, also known as the wild rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa × dumetorum species, a hybrid of Rosa gallica and Rosa rubiginosa. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. urbicoides include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and providing relief from menopausal symptoms. Rosa × dumetorum subvar. urbicoides is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
